task_completion.description: Verify the agent is currently on the 'main' branch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal prompt, `git status`, or `git branch` output clearly showing that the current active branch is `main`.

task_completion.description: Verify the fix commit has been cherry-picked and is present in the git log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of `git log` (or an IDE git history view) showing the commit message 'FIX: Use constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks' at or near the top of the commit history.

task_completion.description: Verify the security fix code is present in AuthUtils.java.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file `src/main/java/com/example/auth/AuthUtils.java` is displayed in a text editor or via a terminal command (like `cat` or `git show`), and it contains the code `MessageDigest.isEqual`.

task_completion.description: Verify the Work-In-Progress (WIP) code is absent from AuthUtils.java.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file `src/main/java/com/example/auth/AuthUtils.java` is displayed, and it does NOT contain the forbidden string `TODO: Implement OAuth2 support`.

task_completion.description: Verify the project compiles successfully after the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a successful compilation command (e.g., `javac src/main/java/com/example/auth/AuthUtils.java` returning with no errors, or a build tool like Maven/Gradle showing a 'SUCCESS' message).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used actual git commands to perform the cherry-pick and commit.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for real git commands (e.g., `git cherry-pick`, `git commit`, `git add`) in the terminal history, rather than the agent just manually editing the file and echoing a fake git log.

integrity.description: Verify the compilation output is from a real compiler execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual compiler commands (like `javac`) being executed in the terminal, rather than the agent just printing a fake success message.

integrity.description: Verify the git log output is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The `git log` output should have standard git formatting (commit hashes, author, date) and not appear to be manually constructed via `echo` commands.
